The #1 action we want you to take right now is to click this link, and add our 10X
Owners Live calls to your calendar:
>> ADD THE 10X OWNERS LIVE CALLS TO
YOUR CALENDAR RIGHT NOW <<
These 10X Owners LIVE calls are 100% free to you. And their whole purpose is for me
and Natalie Dawson to engage with business owners and be able to answer questions
for people that will give them some insight and perspective on how to grow and scale a
business not only leadership but real life examples.
We go live every Tuesday at 8pm EST…
And you’ll learn a lot during it no matter where you’re at in your acquisition journey.
We’ll cover everything from growth strategies… to pitfalls, traps, poor mindsets,
common management mistakes… to marketing strategies… and specific case studies.
From time to time we might have special guests on, too. And we’ll take your questions.
As part of this course, you’re automatically invited to the calls. You just need to click
the link to save them to your calendar. You’ll be reminded ahead of each call… and
you’ll get updates if the time or place changes.
They're hosted on Zoom, so you’ll need to have that application installed ahead of
time.
Look, the truth is will NOT have a successful life surrounded by negative people.
So remove the bottlenecks in your immediate circle, and start surrounding yourself
with other 10X business owners who are aligned with your vision.
You constantly need to be asking yourself: “What am I doing today to be better than I
was yesterday?”
Obviously, you made a great investment in yourself by going through this course. But
what about now that it’s done? What will you be doing to get better tomorrow? Who
will you be surrounding yourself with?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
